Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Hmm? Does human also have trouble with running-trees?

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: It seems Gronk did not understand that particular idiom.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Running-trees treat human better than Trork, but still not well enough!

Line.Text: Tall tree home very dangerous for all outsiders! Many fall and running-trees not care.
